module_overview.title: Calibration Wizard
description: Calibration is essential for accurate VNA measurements. It removes systematic errors
from cables, connectors, and the VNA itself by measuring known reference standards.
The Calibration Wizard guides you through this process step-by-step, ensuring your

kit_section.title: Calibration Kits
kit_section.description_kit: Select a saved calibration kit from the dropdown menu and press Open.
kit_section.import_description: Import a complete calibration kit with its associated calibration data.
